query: US spot Bitcoin ETF net flows June 2026 weekly data Farside Investors
answer: **Summary:** I was unable to retrieve the requested June 2026 weekly Bitcoin ETF flow data from Farside Investors due to all web access tools being unavailable in this session. No quantitative data points for June 2026 could be sourced. The recommended path is to directly access **farside.co.uk/bitcoin-etf-flow-all-data/** or **coinglass.com/bitcoin-etf** for the live daily/weekly flow figures.

key_facts: All web access tools (WebSearch, WebFetch, ToolSearch) were unavailable, preventing retrieval of live June 2026 data.
Farside Investors (farside.co.uk) is the primary tracker for US spot Bitcoin ETF daily net flows.
11 US spot Bitcoin ETFs have traded since January 11, 2024: IBIT, FBTC, GBTC, ARKB, BITB, HODL, BRRR, EZBC, BTCO, BTCW, BTC.
By mid-2025, cumulative net inflows into US spot Bitcoin ETFs had surpassed $40 billion.
BlackRock's IBIT has consistently been the largest recipient of inflows.
GBTC experienced large outflows post-conversion in 2024 but stabilized by 2025.
No June 2026 daily, weekly, or monthly flow figures were retrieved in this session.
